title: galium elatum var. genuinum
intro: Galium elatum var. genuinum, also known as the Alpine Bedstraw, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Galium genus of flowering plants. This perennial herb is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Galium elatum var. genuinum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
